Package ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers

Class Courier

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Courier
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable, Stoppable
public class Courier extends Object implements Runnable, Stoppable
Worker that picks up batches of pizzas from storage and delivers them.

Implements Stoppable (ISP): single-method interface lets Pizzeria control all workers via one abstraction (DIP).

  • Constructor Details

    • Courier

      public Courier(int id, int trunkCapacity, int deliveryTimeMs, PizzaStorage storage, PizzeriaView view)
      Creates a Courier.
      Parameters:
      id - courier identifier
      trunkCapacity - max pizzas per trip; must be positive
      deliveryTimeMs - delivery duration in ms; must be positive
      storage - shared pizza storage
      view - view for all console output

      Requests the worker to finish after completing its current task.

      Returns the delivery duration in milliseconds.
